ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization's mission and services */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the organization */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* List of funding sources for the organization */,
  "partner_organizations" TEXT /* List of partner organizations */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_link" TEXT /* Link to the service's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_services_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_link" TEXT /* URL link to the program's details */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 6 months, 1 year) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the program */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of participants enrolled in the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., vocational, academic) */,
  "program_format" TEXT /* Format of the program (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "program_level" TEXT /* Level of the program (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  "program_category" TEXT /* Category of the program (e.g., IT, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_curriculum" (
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_link" TEXT /* Link to the course's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curriculum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_curriculum_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workforce board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the workforce board */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the workforce board is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the workforce board is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the workforce board */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the workforce board */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the workforce board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workforce board's mission and services */,
  "board_members" TEXT /* List of board members */,
  "meeting_schedules" TEXT /* Meeting schedules for the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_board_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workforce board */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., funding, partnership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_board_relationships_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_board_relationships_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES workforce_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the participant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the participant is located */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Disability status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, achieved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_goals_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's progress (e.g., on track, off track) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_progress_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_progress_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the participant completed the program (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, completed, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, trainer, admin) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant (if the user is a participant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "job_placement" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the participant was placed in a job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant (if applicable) */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer (if applicable) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Starting salary of the participant (if applicable) */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Satisfaction score of the participant (1-10) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the session */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of participants enrolled in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_schedules_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "trainer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "trainer_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "trainer_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "trainer_qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_program_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_program_relationships_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_program_relationships_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)
